name: Balsamic Peppered Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the chicken breasts to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
2. Sprinkle lemon-pepper seasoning evenly on both sides of the chicken.
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat.
4. Add chicken to the pan and cook, turning once about 7 minutes, or until a fork can be easily inserted into the chicken.
5. Remove the chicken to a warm serving platter; keep it warm.
6. In a medium bowl, combine vinegar, broth, and garlic. Pour this mixture into the frying pan.
7. Cook over medium-high heat, scraping up browned meat bits for about 2 minutes, or until the mixture reduces and becomes syrupy.
8. Add butter to the pan; stir until melted.
9. Place chicken on a serving dish and spoon sauce over the chicken.
10. Garnish with parsley and tomatoes.
